summary: Frontend retest of Launchkey dashboard. CRITICAL regression: CRA 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay for ResizeObserver STILL appears the moment the mapping dialog opens, completely covering the screen and blocking all subsequent UI interactions. The window.addEventListener('error',...) suppressor added in /app/frontend/src/index.js does NOT prevent react-error-overlay (webpackHotDevClient) from rendering, because CRA hooks errors at a different layer. Also discovered the test plan's expectation that mapping-target-input accepts 'chrome.exe' is incorrect for action 'Set Volume of App' — the component renders a Radix Select with data-testid 'mapping-target-select' instead, and there is no free-text input in that mode. Only 1 of 8 flows could be fully verified due to the blocking overlay.

ui_bugs.issue: CRA react-error-overlay shows 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' the instant the Radix Select inside the dialog opens. Overlay covers entire viewport with a near-opaque red panel, blocking clicks on Save, Cancel, fields, and every other control on the page. The suppression handler in src/index.js fires (window 'error' listener) but CRA's own dev-overlay listener still receives the event and renders the overlay. preventDefault/stopImmediatePropagation at the window-error level does NOT stop react-error-overlay because it listens via webpack-dev-server-client (overlay package) at the runtime-error iframe level.

For action 'Set Volume of App' the dialog renders 'mapping-target-select' (Radix Select listing live sessions) instead of 'mapping-target-input'. The test plan's instruction to fill mapping-target-input with 'chrome.exe' cannot succeed. Either (a) add a free-text fallback input always present, or (b) update test plan. mapping-target-input count was 0 after selecting that action.

After clicking mapping-save the dialog remained open (count=1). Likely because the missing target field meant the form was invalid, but no inline validation message was visible to the user. No toast / error feedback rendered.

integration_issues.issue: Could not verify GET /api/profiles/{id}/mappings from the test runner — public URL returned HTTP 403 for direct urllib calls (likely WAF/bot-block on non-browser UA). Browser-side calls work. Not a backend bug, just affects automated verification. Use a Browser fetch() inside playwright or add a User-Agent header in test client.

integration_issues.flow: All post-knob-1 flows (delete mapping, new profile, midi-learn auto-open, helper heartbeat status dot, sessions panel population, /setup navigation)
integration_issues.issue: Not testable because the ResizeObserver error overlay blocks the entire dashboard after the first Radix Select interaction. These flows are essentially gated behind the overlay bug.

action_items: FIX (CRITICAL): The window 'error' handler in /app/frontend/src/index.js is NOT sufficient to suppress react-error-overlay. Use one of: (a) install and configure 'react-error-overlay' to ignoreRuntimeErrors matching /ResizeObserver/, e.g. `import { setEditorHandler, dismissRuntimeErrors } from 'react-error-overlay'` plus a window error listener that also calls dismissRuntimeErrors(); (b) wrap window.ResizeObserver with a debounced version that swallows the loop; (c) set environment variable `DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true` and add a `react-app-rewired` config to disable the overlay; or (d) the simplest and recommended fix — wrap ResizeObserver in src/index.js BEFORE React loads: `const RO = window.ResizeObserver; window.ResizeObserver = class extends RO { constructor(cb){ super((entries,obs)=>{ window.requestAnimationFrame(()=>cb(entries,obs)); }); } };` This prevents the loop notification from ever firing.
FIX (HIGH): MappingDialog should always expose a free-text 'mapping-target-input' (alongside the Select) so users can type process names not currently active. Or update test contract.
FIX (HIGH): Add inline validation / toast when Save is clicked with missing target so the user understands why the dialog stays open.

After above fixes, retest the remaining 7 flows (knob save→persist→reopen→delete, new profile create, midi-learn auto-open via /api/helper/midi-event, helper heartbeat -> green dot + 'HELPER ONLINE' text, /api/helper/sessions -> panel population, /setup page navigation + step count + download-script-btn href).
critical_code_review_comments: src/index.js ResizeObserver suppression: window error handler runs AFTER react-error-overlay's own listener registers; ordering and the dev overlay's separate iframe listener mean preventDefault is ineffective. Patch ResizeObserver itself rather than swallowing errors.
MappingDialog: silent failure on save (no toast/validation) is a UX bug.
Setup page anchor: could not verify the href ends with /api/helper/script due to blocked navigation; please verify manually.

success_rate.frontend: ~12% (1 of 8 flows verified: dashboard renders + dialog opens; everything after first Radix Select is blocked)

context_for_next_testing_agent: ResizeObserver overlay regression is the single biggest blocker. Once fixed, re-run all 8 flows from the original request. Test IDs are in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/launchkey.js. Direct urllib calls to /api endpoints return 403 from the runner — use page.evaluate(fetch(...)) inside Playwright to verify persistence. Note that 'Set Volume of App' renders mapping-target-select, not mapping-target-input, so choose 'Custom Command' / similar action (or have main agent add a fallback input) when target is a free-form process name.
rca of the issue: ROOT CAUSE — Screenshot clearly shows CRA's full-screen red error overlay with 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' originating from bundle.js handleError at 55987:58. The suppression in src/index.js adds a window 'error' listener, but: (1) react-error-overlay's own listener was registered first by CRA's webpackHotDevClient and is invoked before stopImmediatePropagation has any chance to prevent it being captured into the dev-overlay iframe; (2) the dev-overlay iframe re-renders independently. REPRODUCTION: load dashboard -> click any knob -> click the Action Radix Select trigger -> overlay appears within ~100ms because Radix popper triggers ResizeObserver as it positions the listbox. MITIGATION: monkey-patch window.ResizeObserver to wrap the callback in requestAnimationFrame at the very top of src/index.js (BEFORE any imports that may instantiate observers). This eliminates the loop-notification entirely, so no error is dispatched, and the overlay never appears.
